name: Humans
description: Divided into myriad houses, humans are the most numerous and adaptable of the City's peoples.
areteTriggers: PLACEHOLDER: Act with conviction despite the odds.
PLACEHOLDER: Show mercy where none is expected.
PLACEHOLDER: Sacrifice for a member of your guild.

kins.name: House Valerian
kins.description: PLACEHOLDER house — a proud line of city merchants and duelists.

kins.name: House Corvid
kins.description: PLACEHOLDER house — scholars and spymasters of the lower wards.

name: Fay
description: The fair folk — elves and gnomes touched by the Far Realms.
areteTriggers: PLACEHOLDER: Honor an old bargain or oath.
PLACEHOLDER: Outwit a foe rather than overpower them.

kins.name: High Elf
kins.description: Long-lived courtiers of the elder houses.

kins.name: Wood Elf
kins.description: Wardens of the deep forests beyond the walls.

kins.name: Dark Elf
kins.description: Dwellers of the twilight roads under the earth.

kins.name: Gnome
kins.description: Tinkerers and hedge-magicians of small stature and large curiosity.

name: Underfolk
description: Peoples of the hills and deeps — dwarves, halflings, and trolls.
areteTriggers: PLACEHOLDER: Uphold a tradition of your people.
PLACEHOLDER: Protect your kith and kin.

kins.name: Dwarf
kins.description: Stout smiths and delvers with memory as long as stone.

kins.name: Halfling
kins.description: Small, quick, and unreasonably lucky wanderers.

kins.name: Troll
kins.description: Slow-spoken giants of the border country, tougher than they look.

name: Orcs
description: The blooded peoples, each attuned to an element of the wild world.
areteTriggers: PLACEHOLDER: Prove your strength in the open.
PLACEHOLDER: Answer an insult to your blood.

kins.name: Earthblooded
kins.description: Unmovable as the mountains they are born beneath.

kins.name: Fireblooded
kins.description: Quick to burn, quicker to act.

kins.name: Seablooded
kins.description: Tidal and patient, with salt in their veins.
